arts.ttl: John McGinn says Celtic story 'winds me up' as Aston Villa skipper answers Parkhead transfer question
arts.sum: Join Football Scotland's Celtic WhatsApp community! Lifelong Hoops fan McGinn says it will be a strange feeling playing against his beloved club under the lights at Villa Park but confessed it grinds his gears when people mention the fact he could have been playing for the men in green-and-white.

arts.ttl: Schmid reportedly keen to leave Werder amid Aston Villa links
arts.sum: Aston Villa are among the suitors for Romano Schmid, who is looking to leave Werder Bremen, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer 'a complete disaster' as return hangs in the balance
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz has struggled to make an impact at Juventus after leaving Aston Villa in the summer. Italian football expert Alasdair Mackenzie spoke on our podcast, Claret & Blue, about the midfielder's slow start in Turin.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery’s private talks with transfer target speak volumes about Aston Villa boss
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager and ex-Arsenal boss Unai Emery is known for his fastidious eye for detail, and one player has now discussed how a simple gesture convinced him to play for the Spanish coach

arts.ttl: £30m bid could be enough for Arsenal or Aston Villa to get transfer done
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reportedly been told that £30million would be enough for them to secure the transfer of Ajax midfielder Kenneth Taylor. The talented 22-year-old has been impressing with his form in the Eredivisie, and sources recently told CaughtOffside about interest from Arsenal as well. ALMOST the perfect result for Arsenal! Taylor is surely good […] The post £30m bid could be enough for Arsenal or Aston Villa to get transfer done appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Juventus outline their plans as fresh injury scare emerges before Aston Villa
arts.sum: Juventus are putting in their final preparations ahead of their Champions League meeting with Aston Villa before they fly to Birmingham on Tuesday - but Thiago Motta might have a fresh injury concern before the latest round of fixtures in Europe's premier competition. Villa entertain Juve hoping to respond to their defeat to Club Brugge last time out, as well as their current streak of four domestic matches without a win, the most recent of those being the 2-2 draw against Crystal Palace on Saturday.
